projectDescription: Modern static website for a construction company with responsive design and modular CSS architecture
keyFeatures: Modular CSS architecture with separate base, layout, components, sections, and responsive stylesheets
Responsive design with mobile-first approach and breakpoints
Interactive project filtering by category (All, Residential, Commercial)
Semantic HTML structure with accessibility considerations
Customizable theme colors and branding through CSS variables
publicApiSurface: Pages: index.html, about.html, services.html, projects.html, contact.html
CSS Modules: base.css, layout.css, components.css, sections.css, responsive.css, main.css
JavaScript: projects-filter.js (filter buttons and project cards management)
